title: Lean Formalization of Depth-5 Boundedness

sorries.name: depth1_real
sorries.description: Requires EML1 inversion: the only EML1 element is 1 (depth 0). Lean needs a proof that EML1 is well-founded at small depth.
sorries.path_to_proof: Inversion lemma: EML1 1 by base; EML1 (eml(1,1)) = EML1 e by step.

sorries.name: depth5_complex_im_eq_neg_pi
sorries.description: Computational claim: ALL depth-5 complex values have Im = -pi. Proved numerically in S90-S92 (41,409 values). Lean proof requires decidable enumeration of finite tree or native_decide.
sorries.path_to_proof: native_decide after bounding the tree; or certified computation via Norm_num extension.

note: The depth-5 boundedness result is provable in Lean given computational certification. The sorry in depth5_complex_im_eq_neg_pi can be closed by a native_decide call once the EML tree is represented as a finite inductive type with certified arithmetic.
